summary: Systematic contract review from initial triage through clause analysis to attorney handoff.

inputs.name: contract_document
inputs.description: The contract or agreement to review.

inputs.name: review_scope
inputs.description: Specific clauses, risks, or business concerns to focus on.

outputs.name: triage_summary
outputs.description: Initial contract classification and priority assessment.

outputs.name: clause_analysis
outputs.description: Clause-by-clause risk analysis with severity ratings.

outputs.name: attorney_handoff
outputs.description: Structured handoff packet with open questions for counsel.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Keep issue spotting and human review explicit.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is contract review and not legal advice or final approval.
Require contract document and review scope before analysis.
Attach not-legal-advice disclaimer and preserve confidentiality.
End with attorney review handoff; never claim autonomous approval.

steps.action: Classify contract type, identify parties, and set review priority.
Perform clause-by-clause risk analysis against standard playbook.
Map contract obligations to applicable compliance frameworks.
Flag data handling, retention, and transfer provisions.
Merge findings into attorney handoff packet with open questions.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read documents, policies, and reference materials.

verification.method: Check the output names contract type and review scope.
Check each flagged clause has a severity rating and rationale.
Check output includes attorney handoff with unresolved questions.

success_criteria: Contract is classified and prioritized correctly.
Each flagged clause includes severity, rationale, and suggested action.
Output ends with attorney handoff, not approval language.

rollback.when: If scope, confidentiality, or review authority is unclear, revert the draft and regenerate a narrower output for counsel review.
